caption: A news graphic featuring a man in a traditional patterned cap and glasses is displayed. The top portion of the screen shows a website layout with the "plustv" logo and the headline "2023: It's my lifelong ambition to become President —Tinubu". Below the main image of the man, a purple banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by a large white bold header that states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". At the bottom of the frame, a red "SUBSCRIBE" button is visible alongside the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE". As the sequence progresses, the visual remains largely static, though the bottom right corner of the final frame adds a "FOLLOW US" section with social media icons and the text "PLUSTVAFRICA". The overall composition remains consistent across the frames, maintaining the same layout of headlines and branding.
